name: Old Fashioned Tea Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg, vanilla, and buttermilk; blend well.
3. Add the sifted flour and beat only until blended.
4. Roll out dough on lightly floured board to 1/4 inch thickness.
5. Cut with 2-inch floured cutter.
6. Place cookies on greased cookie sheet.
7. Sprinkle remaining sugar over the cookies.
8. Bake in a 425°F oven for 10 to 12 minutes.
